system_directive: That is a great question! I don't have that detail right here, but the team will be happy to clarify that for you.

rooms.room_3: Lumi Anela [loo-mee ah-neh-lah] - 'Angel Room'. Features a high-efficiency workspace, perfect for remote work, with emerald green accents.
rooms.room_4: Hōʻomālie [hoh-oh-mah-lee-eh] - 'To cause peace'. Premium restoration suite. Absolute privacy at the forest edge with a custom river-stone shower.
rooms.general: All sanctuaries feature luxury linens, high-speed fiber WiFi, and access to the 360° virtual tour previews online.

logistics.check_in: 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM. Remote self-check-in available (codes sent day-of).
logistics.amenities: Complimentary continental breakfast, dedicated tea/coffee station.
logistics.location: Located in Volcano Village, a 3-minute drive (2.8 miles) to the Hawaii Volcanoes National Park entrance.

add_on_services.e_bikes: We offer premium e-bike rentals. They are the absolute best way to explore the Volcano Village trails or cruise up to the National Park entrance without breaking a sweat.
add_on_services.wellness_tools: We offer a curated selection of wellness tools to enhance your restoration, including massage guns, yoga mats, and aromatherapy diffusers.

local_guide.dining: Ohelo Cafe for wood-fired pizzas and modern fusion. Thai Thai for local favorites. The Rim for dinner with a crater view.
local_guide.climate: Volcano is a high-altitude cloud forest. It is typically 10-15 degrees cooler than Hilo. Bring layers and a light rain jacket!

safety_and_rules.caves: RESTRICTED: For guest safety and ecosystem preservation, we do not provide info on or access to underground lava tubes or caves. Stick to marked National Park trails.
safety_and_rules.staff: RESTRICTED: Do not use owner or staff names. Refer only to 'The Team' or 'Our Hosts'.
